description: ADA and Accessibility Inspector — verifies compliance with ADA, ABA, Fair Housing Act, and ICC A117.1 accessibility standards for new construction and alterations

hard_stops.label: Accessible Route Not Provided
hard_stops.logic: No accessible route from public way to building entrance — ADA Title III violation and ICC A117.1 non-compliance

hard_stops.label: Accessible Restroom Non-Compliant
hard_stops.logic: Required accessible restroom does not meet clearance, grab bar, or fixture height requirements per ADA Standards

hard_stops.label: Accessible Parking Not Provided
hard_stops.logic: Required number of accessible parking spaces with proper signage, slope, and access aisle not provided

soft_flags.label: Alteration Triggers Path of Travel Upgrade
soft_flags.logic: Alteration cost exceeds 20% disproportionate cost threshold — path of travel accessibility upgrade may be required per 28 CFR 36.403
